description: AA-09.3 soak, fault-injection, replay, and MTTR validation for crash-only mode.

soak_scenarios.description: Repeatedly crash and recover a region to verify no state leaks accumulate.
Concurrent crashes across multiple failure domains under load.
Crash during recovery phase itself to test nested crash handling.
Region crashes with obligations in mid-settlement to verify cleanup.

fault_injection_points.description: Inject failure during journal checkpoint write.
fault_injection_points.expected_behavior: Region remains in CRASHING state, retry or tombstone.

fault_injection_points.description: Inject failure midway through journal replay.
fault_injection_points.expected_behavior: Recovery aborted, re-attempt from last checkpoint.
Hook aborted, recovery proceeds with defaults.

fault_injection_points.description: Failure during gradual authority restore after recovery.
fault_injection_points.expected_behavior: Authority remains narrow (OBSERVE only), retry on next epoch.

fault_injection_points.description: Parent region cancels during child microreboot.

recovery_metrics.description: Metrics for measuring recovery quality and performance.

metrics.description: Mean time to recovery from crash to RUNNING state.
Fraction of journal replays that succeed on first attempt.
Fraction of pending obligations successfully re-entered after recovery.
Fraction of recoveries that preserve all region invariants.
Fraction of crash/recovery events with complete structured logs.

reproducibility_requirements.description: Given a crash pack and the source at the pinned commit, the failure is reproducible.
Replaying the same journal twice produces the same recovered state.
Crash pack contains seed, config, trace prefix, and all data needed for reproduction.
Any crash/recovery failure that cannot be reproduced blocks crash-only mode graduation.

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate soak scenario definitions and invariant coverage
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa093 cargo test --test crash_recovery_validation_contract soak -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate fault injection points and expected behaviors
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa093 cargo test --test crash_recovery_validation_contract fault -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate recovery metrics and reproducibility requirements
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa093 cargo test --test crash_recovery_validation_contract metric -- --nocapture
